{{Quote|Imperial troops have entered the base! Imperial troops have ent—|Grond|<ref name="Entrenched">{{StoryCite|story=Entrenched|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}</ref>}}
'''Grond''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military's]] [[4th Squad]], which was under the command of [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Jobin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], 4th Squad was stationed at [[Echo Station 5-7/Legends|Echo Station 5-7]]. Grond noticed that the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] near the [[Echo Base/Legends|South Entrance]] was under attack by [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]] and an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]]. He and [[Sora]] were ordered to flank the Imperials and attack them from the rear while Jobin, [[Roj]], and another soldier attacked the Imperials head-on. They destroyed the AT-ST, although the stormtroopers had already entered the ion cannon and executed the Rebel personnel inside. They then retook the ion cannon. In the vicious close combat, Grond managed to send the transmission "Imperial troops have entered the base," prompting Princess Leia to order the final evacuation of Hoth. He, along with the unidentified rebel, were shot in the struggle. Their sacrifice, however, allowed the squad to recapture the ion cannon and fire at an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], allowing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Transport/Legends|transports]] to escape.

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Imperial troops have entered the base! Imperial troops have ent—|Grond|<ref name="Episode 5">{{Film|V}}</ref>}}
During the Operation Hoth Defensive Event in the [[2013]] card game app ''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'', his quote was given to [[Toryn Farr/Legends|Toryn Farr]] to introduce Raid Battles.
